title: stachys recta var. leucoglossa
intro: Stachys recta var. leucoglossa, also known as white-lipped hedge nettle, is a plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Stachys recta var. leucoglossa include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and soothing digestive issues, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
